executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped WhatsApp Business adapter spec as the first non-Telegram non-HTTP concrete TransportAdapter, proving the spec 061 contract is transport-neutral. 10 BDD scenarios (SCN-072-A01..A10) cover signed-webhook translation, signature rejection, exhaustive AssistantResponse->WhatsApp message-type mapping, text fallback, capture-as-fallback parity, fail-loud SST credentials, independent transport disable, disambig/confirm/reset round-trips, no-silent-template policy, and Meta-retry idempotency.

Created design.md for the WhatsApp Business transport, resolving the webhook path, signature verification, generic transport identity mapping, response render table, fail-loud WhatsApp SST keys, and scenario-to-test mapping for SCN-072-A01..A10.

Created planning artifacts for SCN-072-A01..A10: four sequential scopes, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, uservalidation.md, and planning-only report.md. Status remains in_progress with planMaturityOnly=true.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.
